feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central - Personal Loan
entry.content:
Hello People,

Could you please help me with the following:

In SAP SuccessFactors EC - Advances/Loans, If an employee avails a personal loan, they must meet the following eligibility criteria:

1) 12 months should have passed from the last instalment of the previous loan granted to the employee for personal loan in order to apply for a new personal loan

2) Even if an employee settles a personal loan in the 9th month, they should remain ineligible for a new personal loan until the completion of 12 months.

Best Regards,

Sam SJ

entry.title: Hello how to create Tip Message guidance for employee for required attachment in dependent page
entry.content:
My Client have requirement to add Tip Message on Dependent page to advise them what are the required documents to be attached like birth certificate or marriage certificate

How can i achieve this requirement

Thanks in advance

entry.title: SAC’s Time Hierarchy limitation with SuccessFactors Live OData Connection
entry.content:
Summary

We need to configure a month-, quarter-, and year-level headcount and attrition time-series analyses over a history in SAC, based on the SuccessFactors fields Date of Joining and Last Working Date. However, under a live OData connection from SuccessFactors, SAC treats those fields as plain dimensions—because OData maps ABAP’s date types to Edm.DateTime and SAC’s live connector doesn’t infer the SAC “Date” semantic type—which prevents SAC’s native time hierarchies (Year → Quarter → Month → Week → Day) from being available. The following post outlines the business context, the precise problem face : 

1. Business Scenario

To build time-series analyses for headcount and attrition metrics leveraging live data from SAP SuccessFactors. The end users require:

  • Headcount snapshots of total active employees at each period end, and

  • Attrition rates calculated as leavers during the period divided by average headcount,
    broken down by calendar year, quarter, month, and week, with drill-down capability and filters by department, region, job family, and other organizational dimensions. 

This must operate entirely over the existing live OData connection—we cannot import or replicate data to any other platform (BW, HANA, Datasphere or WFA). 

2. Problem Statement

Under SAC’s live OData connection to SuccessFactors, fields such as Date of Joining and Last Working Date arrive as Edm.DateTime properties in the OData service and are ingested by SAC as generic dimensions without any date semantics. As a result:

  • SAC’s predefined calendar hierarchies (Year → Quarter → Month → Week → Day) are not generated for these dimensions, because SAC only auto-creates them on dimensions explicitly tagged with the SAC Date semantic type in import models. 

  • Model-level configuration is read-only in a live model, so you cannot reassign semantic types or define hierarchies for these fields within SAC. 

  • Native drill-down functionality in charts—users clicking from Year down to Month or Week—is unavailable for these date attributes, blocking standard time-series analytics. 

I’m looking for suggestions or ideas on how to tackle a specific requirement using a live OData-only SAC model. If anyone knows of any workarounds, lesser-known features, or upcoming updates that might help in this scenario, I’d really appreciate it. Thanks!

entry.title: Remove the permission to Insert New Record via history while retaining the Edit (pencil) Icon
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I just want to ask if there's a chance that the edit icon (pencil) will still be visible in the portlet but there's no permission for the user to insert new record?

Thank you very much.

Best Regards,

Gelo

entry.title: 1H 2025 (ECT-233514) - New Standard Element company
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Good day!

I just want to ask further information regarding this. May I know the impact and the effect of this release item?

Thank you very much for the help.

Best Regards,

Gelo

entry.title: Include Contingent Worker should be selected automatically
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Is there any feasibility to keep Contingent Worker should be selected automatically selected rather we have to select it from the Gear always.

This is regarding the update 1H 2025 - Options to Hide Contingent Workers in the Latest Org Chart

Thanks

Ashish

entry.title: How to fetch Direct Reports details of a Manager in a Custom MDF object.
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Can we able to list down the direct reports of a manager in a custom mdf object?  If yes, how can we achieve this? 

Business Requirement.

Customer requires a custom portlet which should display all the direct reportees custom-field information. This gives the manager an overview of employee's custom information collectively in a single portlet. 

Field reference below.

Employee 1 (user id)  --> Employee Name --> Custom record.

Employee 2 (user id) --> Employee Name --> Custom record.

Please let me know if this is possible and also share any reference KBA or a blog if available.

Regards, Shadeesh

entry.title: how to stop creation of new positions from every change in job information
entry.content:
We have recently go live with SAP SuccessFactors Employee central. We have an issue cince then. 

every change we do in job information portlets leads to creation of new positions.

Example : I have change the manager of the Employee, however it creates new position in the system and employee is now on the the new position.

It is creating unnecessary positions in the system.

Please help.

entry.title: Connecting FTE and Pay Component fields
entry.content:
Hello All,

I wished to know if SAP offers something standard to connect FTE and Pay Components. What we are looking for, is that whenever someone changes an employee's FTE, the respective Pay Component must get updated as well. This is to ensure that an employee gets his/her salary based on his/her FTE.

Please let me know.

Thank You.

entry.title: SF TimeOff: Change Employee Flexible Date for Time Account Creation
entry.content:
Dear Community,

we use employee flexible date for time account creation.

Basically, the hire date is the start date of the time account validity, but if the employee goes on parental leave, then the first day after parental leave should be the new validity start date of the following time account. To achieve that, we use a custom field where the flexible date is entered (and changed).

e.g.:

Step 1: Hire Date: 01.05.2024 with custom field filled with date 01.05.2024 - create annual leave account from 01.05.2024 to 30.04.2025

Step 2: add Parental Leave: 01.08.2024 to 31.07.2025 

Step 3: Change the custom field to 01.08.2025 - create next annual leave account from 01.08.2025 to 31.07.2026

Unfortunately, the change of the custom field does not lead to a new validity period for the following time account. It seems that once an account with validity exists, the following account is always created seamless to that one, independent from the employee flexible date. 

Also, it is not possible to change the validity in manage data due to an error massage.

So, we don’t know how to configure this requirement.

Is there a possibility to change the validity period by changing the employee flexible date or can it be changed manually or maybe by file - upload?

 

Thank you and best regards,

Mirko

entry.title: How to identify Login user as Manager in Add new Employee screen - SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hello Everyone-

My requirement is when login user is a manager & he tries to select email type as Business system should show an error. I have created the below business rule using "empl information model" -

 

 

The above condition is not working , I also have tried below options-

1- Is Position Below User’s Position In Hierarchy() (New Version)

Please advice as how can we identify login user as a manager in Add new employee scren.

entry.title: Anyone has SAP SF end user training material for employee and manager.?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am creating an end-user training material in SAP SF EC for employee and manager. Does anyone have the training material sample format?

entry.title: Business Rules (on object, Save) not being triggered for Imports.
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a question about a Business Rule not being triggered for Imports. We have a parent MDF object with field 'Total no.of XYZ' and a child object, where multiple records can be saved. A business rule is configured to update the 'Total No...' field, every time user updates the child record with certain value (e.g. if child object has 2 records with XYZ=1, XYZ= 2; then the rule updates the Total No. field with value 3) .    

Currently, it is updated correctly, upon manual record creation; but not when user imports records in child object. 

This Business rule is created in object (and not UI) and it is a Save rule (not Chnage), so the rule should work. 

Also, user has permissions:

Anything else that is missing?

Thanks in advance.

BR/ Mithila Pethe

 

PS: upon checking the rule trace, I saw that

If child object is updated manually (XYZ=10), then the value 10 of XYZ is picked up in that entry (of the log); Total field on parent object shows 10.

Then if another child object record created via Import (XYZ=20), then entry in rule trace shows 'null'. Total field on parent object still shows only 10 (instead of 30).

If a record is again added manually (XYZ=30), then value of XYZ is picked up for all these 3 entries, ie. 10, 20, 30 respectively (in the log) and the Total field on parent object gets updated with 60.

entry.title: workflow approver does not receive email notification
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We're implementing EC for a client and we've just configured workflows, but the approver does not receive email notification (the template is enabled in email notification template settings). Are there other prerequisites to trigger email notifications from the system?

entry.title: Copy feature from one address type to another
entry.content:
Hi All,

In SF address portlet.. is there a way to add in a copy feature from one address type to another . Eg. Emergency address get's copied from Permanent address if employee selects?

entry.title: Reporting on Employee's Annualized Salary on compensation info.
entry.content:
Hello SuccessFactors Champions,
I have been trying to run an accurate report on employee's annualized Salary on Comp info, which is a transient field and have not yet succeeded in doing so and hence reach out to you all for your guidance and support. 
We have many countries involved with over 100 pay components composing the pay component group Annualized Salary. Hence, we are unable to do a canvas report with calculations for the same.
And the Table report for PayComponent Group Sum does not reflect correct Annualized Salary values for certain countries and also when FTE is not equal to 1. 

I would be grateful for any advice where you have achieved a simpler way of reporting Annualized Salary accurately. 

Looking forward for your assistance. 

Thanks & Regards!

entry.title: How to check all active employees are assigned a valid manager without manager cycle risk ?
entry.content:
Check Tool is having a validation tool to verify manager validity : 

UserWithExistingActiveManager

Unfortunately the program runs 1 single user at a time.

is there an other way for the system to perform manager hierarchy check for the whole active population ? 

not just one employee at a time

entry.title: Workflow approval via Integration Center
entry.content:
Hi, 

Does someone know, if a workflow can be approved via Integration Center?

If yes, could you please share any links, KBAs?

 

Thanks & regards,

Mithila Pethe

entry.title: How to organize Quick Actions in SAP SuccessFactors?
entry.content: Is it possible to organize the Quick Actions in folder or in different colors for example everything regarding time in one color?

entry.title: SAP SucessFactors - Global Benefits - Other Benefits Not Displaying Data
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm having an issue where the "Other Available Benefits" section in SAP SuccessFactors does not display any data, even though I have created a benefit with the type set to "Other". 

This benefit is meant to grant employees a day off on their birthday, if it's on a working day.

  • The benefit is active and applicable to all legal entities.

  • Permissions are correctly assigned via RBP.

  • The block is added to the People Profile.

  • I’ve also tested with proxy access and different users, but no data shows up.

Has anyone encountered this issue before or knows what else I could check?

Thank you.
